glosses.ja: 別のやり方で; さもないと

translations.es: Mañana lo haremos de otra manera.
translations.it: Domani lo faremo in modo diverso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天换一种方式做。
translations.yue: 我哋聽日會用另一種方式做。
translations.pt: Amanhã vamos fazer isso de outra forma.
translations.tr: Bunu yarın farklı bir şekilde yapacağız.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng ta sẽ làm điều đó theo cách khác.
translations.hi: हम यह कल अलग तरीके से करेंगे.
translations.nb: Det gjør vi annerledes i morgen.
translations.id: Besok kita akan melakukannya dengan cara yang berbeda.
translations.sv: Det gör vi annorlunda i morgon.
translations.da: Det gør vi anderledes i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日はそれを違うやり方でやります。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; impersonal/generic 'one' (often used for 'we'); subject of 'fait'.
Main verb: present indicative, 3rd person singular agreeing with 'On'.
Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the direct object of 'fait'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'fait'.
Temporal adverb specifying when the action occurs.

sentences.target: Mets la chaise autrement, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /mɛ la ʃɛz otʁəmɑ̃ sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Mets la chaise autrement, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /mɛ la ʃɛz otʁəmɑ̃ sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Put the chair a different way, please.
translations.es: Pon la silla de otra manera, por favor.
translations.de: Stell den Stuhl bitte anders hin.
translations.it: Metti la sedia in modo diverso, per favore.
translations.yue: 麻煩你將張凳擺個唔同嘅方向。
translations.pt: Coloca a cadeira de outra forma, por favor.
translations.tr: Lütfen sandalyeyi farklı bir şekilde yerleştir.
translations.vi: Làm ơn đặt cái ghế theo cách khác.
translations.ar: من فضلك، ضع الكرسي بطريقة مختلفة.
translations.nl: Zet de stoel alsjeblieft anders neer.
translations.hi: कृपया कुर्सी को अलग तरीके से रखिए.
translations.el: Βάλε την καρέκλα αλλιώς, σε παρακαλώ.
translations.nb: Sett stolen på en annen måte, vær så snill.
translations.id: Tolong letakkan kursinya dengan cara yang berbeda.
translations.sv: Ställ stolen på ett annat sätt, tack.
translations.da: Sæt venligst stolen på en anden måde.
translations.ja: 椅子の向きを変えてください.

tokens.explanation: Main verb: imperative, 2nd person singular; gives a command.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'chaise'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'Mets'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'Mets'.
Subordinating conjunction with elision before vowel; part of the polite idiom.
Subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of 'plaît' within 's'il te plaît'.
Clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular; indirect object of 'plaît'.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; completes the idiom 's'il te plaît' meaning 'please'.

translations.en: I’m doing it differently this time.
translations.es: Esta vez lo hago de otra manera.
translations.it: Questa volta lo faccio in modo diverso.
translations.yue: 今次我用唔同嘅方法做。
translations.ru: На этот раз я сделаю это по-другому.
translations.pt: Desta vez vou fazer isso de outra forma.
translations.he: הפעם אני עושה את זה אחרת.
translations.tr: Bu sefer bunu farklı şekilde yapıyorum.
translations.vi: Lần này tôi làm theo cách khác.
translations.ar: هذه المرة سأفعل ذلك بطريقة مختلفة.
translations.nl: Deze keer doe ich het anders.
translations.uk: Цього разу я зроблю це інакше.
translations.hi: इस बार मैं इसे अलग तरीके से कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Αυτή τη φορά το κάνω αλλιώς.
translations.nb: Denne gangen gjør jeg det annerledes.
translations.id: Kali ini saya melakukannya dengan cara yang berbeda.
translations.sv: Den här gången gör jag det annorlunda.
translations.ro: De data asta o fac altfel.
translations.da: Denne gang gør jeg det anderledes.
translations.ja: 今回は違うやり方でやります。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb: present indicative, 1st person singular; agrees with 'Je'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'fais'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'fois'.
Common noun; the phrase 'cette fois' serves as an adverbial time expression.

sentences.target: Tu peux expliquer autrement, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ɛksplike otʁəmɑ̃ sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux expliquer autrement, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ɛksplike otʁəmɑ̃ sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you explain it differently, please?
translations.es: ¿Puedes explicarlo de otra manera, por favor?
translations.de: Kannst du es bitte anders erklären?
translations.it: Puoi spiegarlo in modo diverso, per favore?
translations.zh-Hans: 能不能换一种方式解释一下？
translations.yue: 可唔可以用另一種方式解釋吓？
translations.pt: Você pode explicar de outra forma, por favor?
translations.he: אפשר להסביר את זה אחרת, בבקשה?
translations.tr: Farklı bir şekilde açıklar mısın lütfen?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể giải thích theo cách khác được không?
translations.ar: هل يمكنك أن تشرح ذلك بطريقة مختلفة، من فضلك؟
translations.nl: Kun je het alsjeblieft anders uitleggen?
translations.hi: क्या आप इसे अलग तरीके से समझा सकते हैं, कृपया?
translations.pl: Czy możesz wyjaśnić to inaczej, proszę?
translations.el: Μπορείς να το εξηγήσεις αλλιώς, σε παρακαλώ?
translations.nb: Kan du forklare det på en annen måte, vær så snill?
translations.id: Bisakah kamu menjelaskannya dengan cara yang berbeda?
translations.sv: Kan du förklara det på ett annat sätt, tack?
translations.ro: Poți să explici altfel, te rog?
translations.da: Kan du forklare det på en anden måde, tak?
translations.ja: 別の言い方で説明してもらえますか？

Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the idiom 's'il te plaît' meaning 'please'.
